{{Quote|To the seventh dungeon with the conquerer-fool. There he shall subjugate rotworms, while his gearwork soldiers stand in glorious tribute to High Exaltedness Kossak.|Kossak Inijic Ar'durv, speaking of Xim|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
[[General/Legends|General]] '''Kossak Inijic Ar'durv''', commonly known as '''Kossak the Hutt''' or '''High Exaltedness Kossak''', was a famous [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] known for defeating [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] at the [[Third Battle of Vontor|climax]] of the [[Xim Wars]] in [[25,100 BBY]], earning the sobriquet '''Devourer of Despots'''.

==Biography==
[[25,102 BBY|Over twenty-five thousand]] years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Kossak was the one Hutt leader to put aside internal squabbles and take action against the threat of Xim's burgeoning empire. Proclaiming himself as the commander of the Hutt [[Kajidic/Legends|clans]], Kossak united his divided [[Species/Legends|species]] and declared war on Xim.

Using Xim's own underhand tactics against him, Kossak effectively fought the Despot for several years, scoring a major victory at the [[First Battle of Vontor]]. After suffering huge losses in a [[Second Battle of Vontor|subsequent]] clash at [[Vontor]], Kossak enlisted the service of the [[Vodran (species)/Legends|Vodran]], [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]], and [[Klatooinian]] species through the [[Treaty of Vontor]], successfully achieved through the efforts of the Hutt representative [[Dojundo]] and bolstered by [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] soldiers. He triumphed over Xim in a [[Third Battle of Vontor|final confrontation]] on the same [[Planet/Legends|world]]. Xim was captured and sent to Kossak's dungeons on [[Varl/Legends|Varl]]. Revered by his progeniture and called the greatest Hutt in history, Kossak was a source of great pride and inspiration among Hutts, and his name was used as an oath, with [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]] claiming to be a descendant.
